  Fix 1: "Disable floatingEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable missingEffectError for this line"

  Fix 2: "Catch all errors with Effect.catchAll"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable floatingEffect for this line" ===
skipped by default

skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable missingEffectError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable missingEffectError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Catch all errors with Effect.catchAll" ===

--- file:///.src/missingEffectError_callExpression.ts ---
// @effect-v3
import * as Data from "effect/Data"
import type * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

class ErrorA extends Data.Error<{
  a: 1
}> {}

class ErrorB extends Data.Error<{
  a: 2
}> {}

class ErrorC extends Data.Error<{
  a: 3
}> {}

declare const effectWithErrors: Effect.Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB | ErrorC>

function testFn(effect: Effect.Effect<number>) {
  return effect
}

// @ts-expect-error
testFn(Effect.catchAll(effectWithErrors, () => Effect.dieMessage("TODO: catchAll not implemented")))

function testFnWithServiceAB(effect: Effect.Effect<number, ErrorA | ErrorB>) {
  return effect
}

// @ts-expect-error
testFnWithServiceAB(effectWithErrors)


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable floatingEffect for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable floatingEffect for entire file" ===
skipped by default

skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable missingEffectError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable missingEffectError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable missingEffectError for entire file" ===
skipped by default
